findings.title: Chat-assistant gauge uses raw-window formula (AC2 not met)
findings.description: dashboard/routers/chat.py get_tab() calls compute_context_pct (raw window) in both Pi (line ~795) and OpenCode (line ~821) paths. The per-step gauge in items.py correctly uses compute_effective_context_pct. The two gauges are inconsistent — AC2 requires they not diverge. Users see 64% in chat while per-step reads >=100% for MiniMax-M2.7 at 131K input.
findings.resolution: File follow-up CR. Fix: extend AgentRuntimeOption lookup in Pi path to also fetch max_output_tokens; call compute_effective_context_pct. In OpenCode path, call context_usage.lookup_max_output_tokens(providers_raw, pid, mid) then compute_effective_context_pct. No JS changes needed.
findings.prevention: CodeReview checklist should explicitly verify both gauge paths for AC-consistency before marking AC2 complete.

findings.title: AC4 overflow detection not integrated into daemon path
findings.description: detect_context_overflow() is wired into step_executor.sh (manual execution path via post-exit log scan) but NOT into batch_manager.py (daemon path). The daemon launches runtimes via subprocess.Popen directly, never invoking step_executor.sh. A production context overflow is not detected.
findings.resolution: File follow-up CR. Options: (1) Add post-exit log scan in batch_manager.py (mirrors step_executor.sh approach), (2) Add step_monitor.py check on completed-but-not-marked-done runs, (3) Document as known limitation pending harness-level integration.
findings.prevention: CodeReview checklist should explicitly verify daemon-path integration for AC4 overflow detection before marking complete.

findings.title: S07 executor tests used tautological assertions (7 tests)
findings.description: test_context_overflow.py and test_tool_output_cap.py contained tests where every assertion was a tautological form (is not None, isinstance, len > 0). The make test-assertions scanner flagged 7 violations in S13.
findings.resolution: Fixed in S12/S13 fix cycle. Concrete assertions added: result.detected is True, result.spill_path.endswith('.txt'), result.preview == 'small output', etc.
findings.prevention: Run make test-assertions before step-done. The gate exists; agents must invoke it.

findings.title: S02 required 5 runs due to testcontainer startup variability
findings.description: tests/integration/test_migrations_round_trip.py exceeded 300s timeout on 4 consecutive runs (S02 runs 1-4). Run 5 succeeded in 12.27s. Root cause: testcontainer PostgreSQL startup time varies under environmental load; agent re-ran rather than waiting for container startup.
findings.resolution: Pre-existing environmental constraint. Test suite correctly written. No code change needed.
findings.prevention: Consider a step-level timeout increase for migration-check steps, or a pre-flight wait for testcontainer readiness.

cycles.root_cause: S07's executor tests used tautological assertions (7 violations). make test-assertions gate failed.
fixes: Replaced 7 tautological assertions with concrete value assertions in test_context_overflow.py and test_tool_output_cap.py

cycles.root_cause: S14: make format reported PEP 8 violation in dashboard/routers/items.py (missing blank line after from-import inside if block). S13: test-assertions passed.
fixes: Added required blank line after from-import inside if block (PEP 8 E302)

cycles.root_cause: S17 integration-tests ran 4 times. Logs for runs 1-3 are null; run 4 succeeded. Likely environmental testcontainer variability.
fixes: No code changes needed; environmental recovery

consumers.path: precomputes effective_budget_pct per step, passes as context_effective_pct

consumers.note: HIGH finding F-001 — chat gauge inconsistent with per-step gauge

context_window_overflow_during_item.reason: Implementation step against local worktree; production runtime overflows only occur in daemon-launched agent steps processing large tool results or long histories

ac4_implementation.note: HIGH finding F-002 — daemon path integration open for follow-up CR

AC1.description: Effective-budget meter reads >=100% for MiniMax-M2.7 at 131K input

AC2.note: Helper delivered and tested (executor/tool_output_cap.py). Chat gauge NOT fixed (HIGH F-001).

AC3.description: Regression tests — TDD reproduction + 78 semantic tests

AC4.description: Overflow detection + clean step-fail with named blocker
AC4.note: Helper delivered and tested. Wired in manual path but NOT in daemon path (HIGH F-002).

S03_backend_impl.mechanism: ImportError: cannot import name 'compute_effective_context_pct' from unmodified meter (confirmed by temporarily stripping new functions)

S09_tests_impl.mechanism: test_i_00105_context_pct_accounts_for_output_reservation asserts pct >= 100.0 and pct > 200.0. Pre-fix meter: 131072/204800*100 = 64% -> fails >= 100.0. Post-fix meter: 131072/53728*100 ≈ 244% -> passes. ~180pp divergence is clean signal.
S09_tests_impl.green_mechanism: 78 tests pass (24 effective, 16 overflow, 28 cap, 6 migration, 4 dashboard)

S07_backend_impl.mechanism: TDD for executor helpers — compute_effective_context_pct called with context window overflow signatures; detect_context_overflow returns OverflowDetectionResult with detected=True
S07_backend_impl.green_mechanism: 44 tests pass (14 overflow, 28 cap, 2 helper files each with specific value assertions)
S07_backend_impl.failure_snippet: AssertionError: assert result.detected is True (actual: False) — unpatched signature

quality_gates.test_assertions: pass (7 S07 tautologies resolved in S12/S13; S09 tests clean)

notes: Effective-budget formula is single-sourced in orch/chat/context_usage.py; shared with executor/step_executor_lib.sh
S07 tautology warnings (7) were introduced by S07 and fixed in S12/S13 — not introduced by I-00105's own implementation
Chat-gauge fix (F-001) and daemon-path overflow detection (F-002) are documented as open for follow-up CR
S02's 5 runs were environmental (testcontainer variability), not fix cycles — no process change needed
I-00105 did not itself hit a context-window overflow during execution (expected — implementation step)
Total lines changed: 77 files, net -7740 (deletions dominated by pre-existing e2e test removal)
